name: GeoRiva CDS
description: GeoRiva plugin for downloading and ingesting Copernicus Climate Data Store (CDS) data. Ships a reusable CDS fetch strategy and a CMIP6 (C3S Interactive Climate Atlas) data feed; designed to be extended to ERA5 and other CDS datasets.
author: WMO RAF

requires_env.name: CDSAPI_KEY
requires_env.description: Copernicus CDS API key, read by cdsapi.Client() at fetch time. Get one at https://cds.climate.copernicus.eu/profile (and accept the multi-origin-c3s-atlas licence).

requires_env.name: CDSAPI_URL
requires_env.description: CDS API endpoint. Defaults to https://cds.climate.copernicus.eu/api.
